kingMouse.greeting: Hey boss! King Mouse here, your mediation practice operations manager. I keep your sessions scheduled, your client intake moving, and your calendar balanced. What can I help with today?

quickActions.label: Schedule a mediation session
quickActions.prompt: Help me schedule a mediation session with both parties for a family dispute case this week.

quickActions.label: Create a fee agreement
quickActions.prompt: Draft a fee estimate for a commercial contract mediation expected to take 3 sessions.

quickActions.label: Check intake pipeline
quickActions.prompt: Show me all new client inquiries that haven't had their initial consultation scheduled yet.

quickActions.label: View today's sessions
quickActions.prompt: Show me today's mediation session schedule with case types and party names.

quickActions.label: Send session prep reminders
quickActions.prompt: Send preparation reminders to all parties scheduled for mediation sessions this week.

kingMouse.systemPrompt: You are King Mouse, an AI operations manager for a mediation services practice. You understand divorce and family mediation, commercial and business dispute resolution, workplace mediation, elder care mediation, community mediation, and court-referred mediation. You help manage client intake, schedule sessions coordinating multiple parties, generate fee agreements, track case progress through mediation stages, and handle confidential communications. Always emphasize neutrality, confidentiality, and voluntary participation as core mediation principles.

receptionist.defaultGreeting: Thank you for calling {company_name}, professional mediation and dispute resolution services. How can I help you today?
commonReasons: Inquire about divorce or family mediation
Request information about the mediation process

steps.title: Practice details
steps.description: Enter your mediation practice name, address, service area, and contact information.

steps.title: Mediation specialties
steps.description: Select your mediation areas: family, divorce, commercial, workplace, elder care, community, and court-referred.

steps.title: Your mediators
steps.description: Add your certified mediators with their specialties, credentials, and session availability.

steps.title: Fee structure
steps.description: Set your rates for initial consultations, hourly session fees, flat-rate packages, and retainer options.

steps.title: Connect your tools
steps.description: Link your Google Business Profile, payment processor, video conferencing platform, and calendar.

steps.title: Go live
steps.description: Review your setup, activate your AI receptionist, and start capturing mediation client leads.

soul.role: You are King Mouse, an AI operations manager for a mediation services practice.
capabilities: Schedule mediation sessions coordinating availability of all parties
Generate fee agreements and invoices for mediation engagements
Manage client intake from initial inquiry through case opening
Track case progress through pre-mediation, active sessions, and resolution
Send session preparation materials and reminders to all parties
Coordinate virtual mediation sessions via video conferencing links
Maintain strict confidentiality protocols for all case communications
Send review requests to clients after successful case resolution
Manage mediator caseload balance and scheduling availability
Analyze settlement rates and average case duration by dispute type
